goals.title: Fix login page crash on Safari
goals.summary: Users on Safari 17 experience a blank page after clicking login. React hydration error in console.

goals.title: Add dark mode toggle to settings
goals.summary: Users have requested a dark mode preference. Store preference in localStorage and apply theme class to root.

goals.title: Investigate intermittent 500 errors on checkout API
goals.summary: Checkout endpoint returns HTTP 500 for roughly 2% of requests. Appears correlated with payment gateway timeouts.

goals.title: Write onboarding documentation for new hires
goals.summary: Create an onboarding guide covering repo setup, dev environment, and deployment workflow.

goals.title: Upgrade PostgreSQL from 14 to 16
goals.summary: Plan and execute database major version upgrade. Includes backup, test migration, and rollback strategy.

goals.title: Set up CI pipeline for the mobile app
goals.summary: Configure GitHub Actions to build and test the React Native app on every PR. Run unit tests and e2e smoke test.

goals.title: Refactor user permissions module
goals.summary: The permissions module has grown unwieldy. Extract role logic into a dedicated service and add unit tests.

goals.title: Security audit of authentication flow
goals.summary: Review OAuth flow for vulnerabilities. Check token storage, refresh handling, and session invalidation.
